title: Adding Connected Board Columns as a selectable column in the Cards View
excerpt: In the Cards view, you can select Mirrored columns as viewable items in each card, but not the connected board columns they are referencing! This doesn’t make sense to me and I need to see all columns in a main table in …

posts.author: calebemg (Caleb Mason)
posts.cookedHtml: In the Cards view, you can select Mirrored columns as viewable items in each card, but not the connected board columns they are referencing! This doesn’t make sense to me and I need to see all columns in a main table in the cards view.

posts.author: jking_PM (Jameson King)
posts.cookedHtml:
I also NEED this functionality.

Seems like something that should have been implemented from the start. Very odd that it’s not in card view,
